content.en:
With the passage of time, there were more and more Fourfold Primordial Ancestors gathered here, and their number had reached a very terrifying level, and even the number of Fivefold Primordial Ancestors and Half-Step Sixfold Primordial Ancestors who escorted these Quadruple Primordial Ancestors was not a few.

A long time has passed, and all the forces have arrived!

"You enter this pagoda, after breaking through to the seventh layer, you can directly enter the primordial golden domain from the seventh layer, if you can't even enter the seventh layer, then you should come back. Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor said.

"Yes!"

Many fourfold ancestors responded to the Tao.

One by one, the Quadruple Ancestors entered this pagoda, and Ye Tian naturally entered as well.

Each of the Quadruple Ancestors entered a different area, so they would not meet each other.

Ye Tian entered the first layer of this pagoda and quickly met an opponent.

This is a condensed opponent with good combat effectiveness.

However, Ye Tian made a move to instantaneously kill him.

Second floor!

Third floor!

Fourth floor!

......

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian broke through the seventh layer.

At this time, a portal appeared.

Ye Tian passed through the portal and directly entered the Primordial Golden Domain.

Primordial Golden Mile.

After Ye Tian entered here, he felt the particularity of this area, the energy was still the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, but there was a special energy between heaven and earth, this energy was easily absorbed by the Primordial Ancestor, and the cultivation of the Primordial Ancestor was improved.

"If you can cultivate here, your cultivation speed will be at least dozens of times that of the outside world!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, the Primordial Golden Realm will give birth to the Primordial Golden Bead, so it will naturally be blocked, and the Primordial Ancestor will not be allowed to practice here casually.

It didn't take long for the Quadruple Primordial Ancestors to come here, and the Quadruple Primordial Ancestors who couldn't break through the seventh layer left the pagoda one by one and returned to the outside world.

......

"A total of sixty-three Quadruple Ancestors have entered, which is okay!"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor muttered.

In the last session, the Void Tooth Holy Gate had only entered fifty-nine Quadruple Ancestors, and this time there were four more Quadruple Ancestors.

Of course, quantity doesn't mean anything, quality is more important!

If this batch of Fourfold Primordial Ancestors can give birth to a few more Quadruple Primordial Ancestors, this is the most important thing.

At this moment, a half-step sixfold ancestor outside the Primordial Golden Domain proposed to take a gamble to see which high-level Primordial Domain had entered the top one hundred Quadruple Primordial Ancestors with the largest number.

Any fivefold ancestor of the higher origin realm can participate in the gambling battle, and there will be certain odds.

For example, in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, the number of fourfold primordial ancestors given is more than one, two or more, and zero three choices.

If a bet on two or more Quadruple Ancestors is within the top 100 of the Primordial Golden Mile, and the result is really the case, then the bet on the Quadruple Ancestor will get the bet, and if the result is not so, then the bet will be lost.

It was also a pleasure for them, the five-fold ancestor, the half-step six-fold ancestor.

Now.

The many fivefold peak ancestors of the Shangling Origin Domain didn't know whether they should participate or not, but after thinking about it carefully, they still participated, didn't ask for more, and just bet a little bit of resources casually, which was regarded as fun.

"The Fourfold Origin Ancestor of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain has entered the top hundred, it's difficult!"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor sighed secretly.

In the last session, none of the Shangling Origin Domain entered the top 100.

The standard of the top 100 is not only the number of Primordial Gold Beads obtained, but also the kill value, for example, if you kill a lot of Quadruple Ancestors, then the ranking will increase.

Of course, there are a lot of Primordial Gold Beads obtained, and your ranking will also increase.

And how to detect these will be recorded in the book by an original treasure, the Ten Thousand Xuan List, which is very fair and will not be wrong.

"I'll also bet on one or two Quadruple Origin Ancestors in the Spirit Origin Domain to enter the top hundred. This time, there is a very demonic Fourfold Ancestor Holy Son in the Upper Spirit Holy Gate, who has been suppressing cultivation, and once he enters the Primordial Golden Domain, he will break through to a half-step Fivefold Ancestor. And he has a lot of hole cards, and with his strength, as long as he is not unlucky, he may really hope to make it into the top 100. It's a pity that if you bet on one, the odds they set are too low, it is better to bet on two people, and the odds are ten times!"

The Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor secretly said.

Ten times the odds This is very much looking down on the Spirit Origin Domain, but this is also an opportunity, if the bet wins, then it will make a lot of money!

......

Ye Tian didn't know that those five-fold ancestors and half-step six-fold ancestors were betting in the outside world, and if he knew, he wouldn't care!

For him, the goal this time is to obtain a large number of primordial gold beads.

According to the information, the primordial gold beads were bred randomly, and there is no pattern, and if you are lucky, you may be able to pick up the primordial gold beads at will.

Of course, there is an environment where a large number of Primordial Orbs will be born, and that is an area that emits a lot of golden light, and there will be a lot of Primordial Orbs.

Ye Tian kept searching in the Primordial Golden Domain, and soon found a Primordial Golden Bead.

"The first one, luck is okay!"

Ye Tian smiled.

But he also knew very well that this was just entering the Primordial Gold Domain, and there were a lot of Primordial Gold Beads here, which led to the fact that he could pick one up casually.

After a long time has passed, don't think about picking up the Primordial Gold Beads easily, and even need to fight each other to snatch enough Primordial Gold Beads.

Of course, you can also choose to leave the original golden mile directly, and then you will not be killed.

However, before they had gathered enough primordial gold beads, many of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestors were probably unwilling!

......

"Whew, I finally broke through to a half-step fivefold ancestor!"

Changshan Yuan Ancestor said excitedly.

Although the half-step five-fold ancestor is not remarkable, with his strength, he is at least among the top among the many original ancestors of the Primordial Golden Domain!

"Half-step fivefold primordial ancestor, and I have solidified two natal primordial mastery techniques, and both are consummate primordial mastery techniques, with my level, even if I encounter those perverts, there is hope to escape! It's time to find the primordial gold beads, and slaughter some weak people by the way." The group of half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestors in the outside world must be gambling, I have to have some Primordial Ancestors, to reach the top 100 on the list, and to be famous in the entire Primeval Domain!" Chang Shan Primordial Ancestor muttered.

Fame is what he desires the most!

Time passed slowly, and Changshan Origin Ancestor found a few Primordial Gold Beads, and also killed the two Quadruple Peak Ancestors in the middle, but unfortunately there were nothing good on each other.

He enjoys killing, though.

Abrupt.

He sensed the aura of a Quadruple Ancestor again.

"This powerhouse at the peak of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor should have only broken through for a long time!"

Changshan Yuan Ancestor secretly said.

At this time, the Fourfold Ancestor also looked at him, and the two sides looked at each other in the air.

"A half-step fivefold ancestor!"

Ye Tian noticed the half-step fivefold ancestor staring at him in the void in front of him, and seemed to be looking for trouble for himself.

Swish!

The other party made a move, and it was directly a consummation-level natal primordial control technique.
